view.title: Validate persona scenario #1

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 1 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior regarding a race condition on the last slot. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or results from the simulation of this scenario, making it impossible to confirm whether the expected result was achieved. The lack of concrete evidence to support the validation of the scenario leads to an inconclusive status.
